cover.title: your seniors are right not to trust agents yet
cover.sub: their distrust isn't resistance. it's a requirements doc. here's what it's asking for.

slides.title: distrust is a spec
slides.body: when a senior says 'i don't trust it in prod,' that isn't a blocker. it's a list of conditions the system hasn't met yet. write them down.

slides.title: then the real question
slides.body: stops being 'do we trust the agent?' and becomes 'do we trust the controls around it?' that one your seniors can actually answer.

cta.title: make ai coding agents reliable
cta.sub: scoped, gated, observable, current. the controls your seniors are really asking for.
